name: Medium Quiet
description: A small group in close confidence, heads together, apart from the world.
hld_patterns: {setting}. A small group drawn close together, apart from their surroundings.
{setting}. Figures in tight cluster, the space around them irrelevant.
{setting}. A private moment — figures huddled, close-framed.
background_pool: A dim corner booth in a quiet bar, worn leather seating curving around the figures, a single pendant light hanging low over the table, the rest of the room out of focus and empty, amber tones and deep shadow

A church pew in a side chapel, stone columns and stained glass behind the figures, dust motes floating in a shaft of colored light, the vast nave blurring into soft darkness beyond, the space hushed and ancient
A back porch at dusk, peeling paint and wicker furniture, fireflies rising from the grass, the sky a deepening indigo behind the figures, the silhouette of trees at the edge of the yard
A fireside circle at a camp, logs arranged as seating, the low fire between them, surrounding forest vanishing into darkness, stars beginning to show overhead, the warmth of firelight on the figures
action_pool: one hand on the other's knee
looking over their shoulder, checking they're alone
arm around the other's back, holding close
wiping a tear with the back of their hand
